flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Alvernia University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.4k → $24.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Alvernia University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.3k → $45.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alvernia University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Alvernia University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 (47.9% → 54.3%).
